color: rgb(77, 77, 77);">User (U)</font></b></div><font style="color: rgb(77, 77, 77);"><font style="font-size: 10px;">小王, 25岁</font><span style="font-size: 10px; background-color: transparent;">, 科技爱好者</span></font><div><font style="font-size: 10px; color: rgb(77, 77, 77);">近期观看: iphone评测</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" edge="1" parent="2" source="6" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#4D4D4D;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E8;strokeColor=#388E3C;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px; color: rgb(77, 77, 77);"><b>Context (C)</b></font><div><span style="font-size: 10px;"><font style="color: rgb(77, 77, 77);">周五 20:30, WIFI环境</font></span></div><div><span style="font-size: 10px;"><font style="color: rgb(77, 77, 77);">使用手机观看</font></span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="1.5" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" edge="1" parent="2" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#4D4D4D;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="349.5" y="110" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="2" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 40px; color: rgb(77, 77, 77);">$$f$$</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="211.5" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="2" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" value="<font style="color: rgb(153, 153, 153);"><span style="font-size: 10px;">“用户会喜欢这个物品吗？”</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="68.5" x="207.25" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="2" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;aspect=fixed;" value="<font style="color: rgb(211, 47, 47);
